content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "結帳買東西",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "你好，請問需要袋子嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, qǐng wèn xūyào dàizi ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, qing3 wen4 xu1yao4 dai4zi ma?",
          "translation_en": "Hello, do you need a bag?",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 봉투가 필요하신가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "不用，謝謝。我有一個環保袋。",
          "pinyin": "Bù yòng, xièxie. Wǒ yǒu yī ge huánbǎo dài.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4 yong4, xie4xie. Wo3 you3 yi1 ge huan2bao3 dai4.",
          "translation_en": "No, thank you. I have a reusable bag.",
          "translation_ko": "아니요, 괜찮습니다. 제가 에코백이 있어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，總共是兩百三十塊。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, zǒnggòng shì liǎng bǎi sān shí kuài.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, zong3gong4 shi4 liang3 bai3 san1 shi2 kuai4.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, the total is 230 dollars.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 총 230원입니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "我要用信用卡付款。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ yào yòng xìnyòngkǎ fùkuǎn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 yao4 yong4 xin4yong4ka3 fu4kuan3.",
          "translation_en": "I want to pay by credit card.",
          "translation_ko": "신용카드로 결제할게요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "可以，請在這裡刷卡。",
          "pinyin": "Kěyǐ, qǐng zài zhèlǐ shuākǎ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ke3yi3, qing3 zai4 zhe4li3 shua1ka3.",
          "translation_en": "Sure, please swipe your card here.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 여기서 카드를 긁어주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "好，謝謝。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, xièxie.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3, xie4xie.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, thank you.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 감사합니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did the customer use to pay?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 무엇으로 결제했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Cash", "Credit card", "Electronic payment"],
          "options_ko": ["현금", "신용카드", "전자결제"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and intonation.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice saying: 'I want to pay by credit card' and 'I have a reusable bag' in Chinese."
    },
    {
      "title": "發票問題",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "不好意思，可以給我發票嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Bù hǎo yìsi, kěyǐ gěi wǒ fāpiào ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4 hao3 yi4si, ke3yi3 gei3 wo3 fa1piao4 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Excuse me, can I have the receipt?",
          "translation_ko": "실례합니다, 영수증을 주시겠어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，請問要存載具嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, qǐng wèn yào cún zàijù ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, qing3 wen4 yao4 cun2 zai4ju4 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Sure, would you like to save it to your carrier?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 수납함에 저장하시겠어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "不用，我只要紙本發票。",
          "pinyin": "Bù yòng, wǒ zhǐ yào zhǐběn fāpiào.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4 yong4, wo3 zhi3 yao4 zhi3ben3 fa1piao4.",
          "translation_en": "No, I just want a paper receipt.",
          "translation_ko": "아니요, 종이 영수증만 주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "沒問題，這是您的發票。",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèntí, zhè shì nín de fāpiào.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 wen4ti2, zhe4 shi4 nin2 de fa1piao4.",
          "translation_en": "No problem, here is your receipt.",
          "translation_ko": "문제없습니다, 여기 영수증입니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "謝謝，再見。",
          "pinyin": "Xièxie, zàijiàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xie4xie, zai4jian4.",
          "translation_en": "Thank you, goodbye.",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다, 안녕히 계세요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What kind of receipt did the customer want?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 어떤 영수증을 원했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Electronic receipt", "Paper receipt", "No receipt"],
          "options_ko": ["전자 영수증", "종이 영수증", "영수증 없음"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and intonation.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice saying: 'Excuse me, can I have the receipt?' and 'I just want a paper receipt' in Chinese."
    },
    {
      "title": "付款問題",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "不好意思，我的信用卡不能刷。",
          "pinyin": "Bù hǎo yìsi, wǒ de xìnyòngkǎ bù néng shuā.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4 hao3 yi4si, wo3 de xin4yong4ka3 bu4 neng2 shua1.",
          "translation_en": "Excuse me, my credit card won't swipe.",
          "translation_ko": "실례합니다, 제 신용카드가 안 긁혀요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "沒關係，您可以用現金或電子支付。",
          "pinyin": "Méi guānxi, nín kěyǐ yòng xiànjīn huò diànzǐ zhīfù.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 guan1xi, nin2 ke3yi3 yong4 xian4jin1 huo4 dian4zi3 zhi1fu4.",
          "translation_en": "No problem, you can use cash or electronic payment.",
          "translation_ko": "괜찮습니다, 현금이나 전자결제를 사용하실 수 있습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "好，我用現金。總共多少錢？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, wǒ yòng xiànjīn. Zǒnggòng duōshao qián?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3, wo3 yong4 xian4jin1. Zong3gong4 duo1shao qian2?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I'll use cash. How much is the total?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 현금으로 할게요. 총 얼마인가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "總共是一百五十塊。",
          "pinyin": "Zǒnggòng shì yī bǎi wǔ shí kuài.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zong3gong4 shi4 yi1 bai3 wu3 shi2 kuai4.",
          "translation_en": "The total is 150 dollars.",
          "translation_ko": "총 150원입니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "這是兩百塊，找零五十塊。",
          "pinyin": "Zhè shì liǎng bǎi kuài, zhǎo líng wǔ shí kuài.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zhe4 shi4 liang3 bai3 kuai4, zhao3 ling2 wu3 shi2 kuai4.",
          "translation_en": "Here's 200 dollars, change is 50 dollars.",
          "translation_ko": "여기 200원입니다, 거스름돈 50원입니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "謝謝，這是您的找零和收據。",
          "pinyin": "Xièxie, zhè shì nín de zhǎo líng hé shōujù.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xie4xie, zhe4 shi4 nin2 de zhao3 ling2 he2 shou1ju4.",
          "translation_en": "Thank you, here is your change and receipt.",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다, 여기 거스름돈과 영수증입니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Why did the customer have a payment problem?",
          "question_ko": "손님이 결제 문제를 겪은 이유는 무엇입니까?",
          "options_en": ["Credit card didn't work", "Not enough cash", "Forgot wallet"],
          "options_ko": ["신용카드가 안 됨", "현금이 부족함", "지갑을 잊어버림"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and intonation.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice saying: 'My credit card won't swipe' and 'I'll use cash' in Chinese."
    }
  ]
}
